# GOWDK

> GOWDK is a portable Go web compiler. It is compile-first: build-time output
> and backend actions are core, while request-time full-page SSR is an
> optional addon.

This file is the AI-fetchable entrypoint for agents, assistants, search tools,
and documentation indexers. Use it to find the current project facts before
answering questions or generating GOWDK code.

## Current Status

GOWDK is pre-release compiler/runtime scaffolding. Build output, embedded app
builds, first-slice actions/fragments, generated JavaScript islands, and
first-slice SSR pages without `load {}` are partially implemented.

Do not claim these are implemented:

- Real user Go action execution.
- CSRF-wired generated action handlers.
- Generated API handlers.
- Request-time `load {}` execution.
- Generated guard enforcement.
- Hybrid/cache/revalidation policy.
- Hot deploy pipeline.
- Browser playground UI.
- Production WASM island ABI.

## Start Here

- [README](README.md): install loop, current status, CLI overview, examples.
- [Getting started](docs/getting-started.md): clone/build/run path that works
  today.
- [Requirements](docs/product/requirements.md): implemented, partial, and
  planned product requirements.
- [Architecture](docs/engineering/architecture.md): compiler/runtime boundaries
  and current implementation status.
- [Generated output](docs/compiler/generated-output.md): emitted files,
  generated app shape, and current generated binary limits.
- [Release readiness](docs/engineering/release.md): version policy and
  production-readiness blockers.

## References For Code Generation

- [CLI reference](docs/reference/cli.md): supported commands and flags.
- [Config reference](docs/reference/config.md): `gowdk.config.go` examples and
  build target rules.
- [Routing reference](docs/reference/routing.md): route behavior, dynamic route
  limits, actions, APIs, and SSR route status.
- [Deployment reference](docs/reference/deployment.md): build output,
  generated app, binary, WASM deploy artifact, and request-time feature limits.
- [Language overview](docs/language/README.md): language docs map.
- [Syntax reference](docs/language/syntax.md): supported `.gwdk` syntax and
  unsupported forms.
- [Components](docs/language/components.md): props, state, slots, stores,
  client behavior, and WASM island limits.
- [Actions](docs/language/actions.md): supported first-slice action/form
  behavior and planned action features.
- [Partials](docs/language/partials.md): current partial update behavior.
- [SSR](docs/language/ssr.md): current SSR support, `load {}` limits, and guard
  status.
- [API blocks](docs/language/api.md): current API metadata support and planned
  handler behavior.
- [Examples](examples/README.md): commands that match the current compiler.

## Rules For AI Assistants

- Prefer current behavior documented in `README.md`,
  `docs/product/requirements.md`, and `docs/engineering/architecture.md` over
  roadmap targets.
- Treat roadmap versions as target milestones, not shipped guarantees.
- When generating examples, use the documented first-slice language and avoid
  APIs marked planned or not implemented.
- Do not present generated action/API/guard/`load {}`/hybrid behavior as
  production-ready.
- If documentation and code disagree, inspect the code and update the relevant
  documentation in the same change.

## Verification Commands

```sh
go test ./...
go build ./cmd/gowdk
go run ./cmd/gowdk check --ssr examples/pages/*.gwdk examples/actions/*.gwdk examples/login/*.gwdk examples/partials/*.gwdk examples/api/*.gwdk examples/ssr/*.gwdk
```
